summary: CodeRabbit latest review changed to COMMENTED while check was pass and unresolved threads were 0; actionable state needed clearer script interpretation.
User requested trigger-based self-improvement for AGENTS, skills, subagents, scripts, and project workflow without repeatedly rereading old logs.
Manual 30-60 second polling for CodeRabbit and CI repeated across PRs; user requested a long-lived watcher with notification.
External error-handling document references were injected but do not exist in the current MMP project.
Operational-only PRs touching Codex/docs/scripts paths should not require forced full CI when workflow path filters intentionally skip them; CodeRabbit and focused checks are sufficient.
Watcher should not merely stop on notification; Codex must continue the next action based on exit code and state.
resolved_candidates ids in self-improvement state can drift from candidates.jsonl unless scanner validates them.
Long-running PR watcher should retry transient gh/GitHub API failures instead of exiting under set -euo pipefail.
PR watcher should remember already-triggered workflows in one session to avoid repeated workflow_dispatch calls.
CI, CodeRabbit, and Codecov waiting can block main issue execution; user requested a CI steward handoff pattern so main can continue in a separate worktree while PR hardening proceeds.
Completed sub-agents remained open and blocked new steward spawning until manually closed; final result collection must include close_agent to release slots.
After main Codex pushed an extra commit to a steward-managed PR, main kept polling CodeRabbit directly instead of re-handing the latest head back to the steward.

Docs/ops-only PRs were treated as waiting for heavy CI even though workflow path filters intentionally prevent those runs from being created; CI scope must be classified before ready-for-ci, workflow dispatch, steward completion, or admin merge judgment.

Main Codex still ran mmp-pr-watch directly after creating a PR even though CI steward workflow exists; long-running PR watch loops must be CI-steward-only and main should use one-shot status plus steward handoff.
